mapper.sql: select id, gallery_id, image_name, original_name, image_url, image_size, image_type, width, height, description, image_tags, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_gallery_image
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and gallery_id = #{galleryId} and image_name like concat('%', #{imageName}, '%')
order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_gallery_image(gallery_id, image_name, original_name, image_url, image_size, image_type, width, height, description, image_tags, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{galleryId}, #{imageName}, #{originalName}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageSize}, #{imageType}, #{width}, #{height}, #{description}, #{imageTags}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_gallery_image set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}

update tdw_gallery_image set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where gallery_id in
#{id}
